investigationScope: read-only measurement; no application code changes

database.note: Local script uses DATABASE_URL from .env — compare host/mode to Vercel production env.

signatures.sampleSql: SELECT "public"."game_stats"."id", "public"."game_stats"."gameId" FROM "public"."game_stats" LEFT JOIN "public"."games" AS "orderby_1" ON ("orderby_1"."id") = ("public"."game_stats"."gameId") WHERE ("public"."game_stats"."playerId" = $1 AND "public"."game_stats"."deletedAt" IS NULL) ORDER BY "orderby_1"."gameDate" DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3

slowest.sql: SELECT "public"."game_stats"."id", "public"."game_stats"."gameId" FROM "public"."game_stats" LEFT JOIN "public"."games" AS "orderby_1" ON ("orderby_1"."id") = ("public"."game_stats"."gameId") WHERE ("public"."game_stats"."playerId" = $1 AND "public"."game_stats"."deletedAt" IS NULL) ORDER BY "orderby_1"."gameDate" DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "public"."game_stats"."id" FROM "public"."game_stats" LEFT JOIN "public"."games" AS "j1" ON ("j1"."id") = ("public"."game_stats"."gameId") WHERE ("public"."game_stats"."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ("j1"."seasonId" = $1 AND "j1"."deletedAt" IS NULL AND ("j1"."id" IS NOT NULL))) OFFSET $2) AS "sub"

SELECT "public"."game_stats"."id", "public"."game_stats"."gameId" FROM "public"."game_stats" LEFT JOIN "public"."games" AS "orderby_1" ON ("orderby_1"."id") = ("public"."game_stats"."gameId") WHERE ("public"."game_stats"."playerId" = $1 AND "public"."game_stats"."deletedAt" IS NULL) ORDER BY "orderby_1"."gameDate" DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3

rootCauseAnalysis.clientSecondLoaderNote: PlayerTrendsChart and PlayerPercentileRadar fetch /api/players/[slug]/profile after hydration — adds a second serverless invocation not included in RSC HTML TTFB.

recommendations: DATABASE_URL uses Supabase transaction pooler (:6543). Each Prisma statement pays BEGIN/DEALLOCATE/COMMIT overhead (~626ms measured locally across 47 statements). Fewer round-trips help more than micro-optimizing SQL inside a phase.

Slowest phase is loadPlayerById deep include — Prisma expands this into many SQL round-trips (player, ratings, ranking rows, game stats, games, teams, leagues). Indexing alone may not fix; reducing join breadth or denormalizing hot fields would.
If Vercel functions cold-start, first request adds 1–3s+ before any DB work — compare coldFirstMs vs warmMedianMs in productionHttp.
Charts issue a second GET /api/players/[slug]/profile after hydration — users measuring 'page ready' in DevTools may see ~2× loader cost.
